segments.title: Defiant class as a missile battleship
segments.summary: The episode frames the Defiant or Trump class as a guided-missile firepower ship rather than a classic dreadnought-style battleship.
segments.body: The battleship label is being used for the most lethal non-carrier surface combatant, with large missile magazines and strike-cruiser-like roles rather than a traditional balance of armor, guns, and speed.

evidence.note: The opening defines the BBG label, contrasts the announcement with dreadnought-era battleship assumptions, and reads the ship as a firepower-centered surface combatant.
The later specification discussion covers hypersonic missile tubes, cost caveats, nuclear-power ambiguity, and the larger-surface-combatant requirement.
The conclusion says it is not a dreadnought-style battleship, then explains the logic of the name through lethality, task-group use, and graduated deterrence.
